ValidationRule.description: Leaving Draft requires an active customer with email. Manager fallback routing is enforced in Apex.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(LoanStatus__c) <> "Draft", OR( ISBLANK(Customer__c), NOT(Customer__r.IsActive__c), ISBLANK(Customer__r.Email__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Loans beyond Draft require an active customer with an email address.
